changes.before: The stumble had not come from bad footing. Her head had snapped north toward a line of low bluffs.
changes.after: Her head had snapped north toward a line of low bluffs.

changes.before: "The plague in Lordaeron wasn't one design on the surface. It looked that way because flesh is easier to read than the machinery beneath it. But under that, it repeated itself. The same turns. The same ordering. This does too."
changes.after: "The plague in Lordaeron repeated itself under the surface. Flesh was easier to read than the machinery beneath it. The same turns. The same ordering. This does too."

changes.before: Clever. Not enough to win. Enough to leave.
"Not a weakness. A seam. It repeats there."
Each mile inland pulled that complaint tighter across the back of her teeth.
changes.after: The ache across the back of her teeth tightened as they pushed inland.
Everyone there knew what it was.

changes.before: "And if I stay in it now, a cursed blade walks out into the world with the prince you've come north to stop wrapped around the hilt."
changes.after: "And if I stay in it now, the prince you've come north to stop walks out into the world carrying a cursed blade."

changes.before: No mortal training crossed ground that way.
changes.after: He crossed the ground with impossible speed.

changes.before: Jaina backed toward the mouth without turning, one hand holding the narrowing wall, the other still twitching small furious notations because part of her refused to stop working.
changes.after: Jaina backed toward the mouth without turning, one hand holding the narrowing wall, the other still twitching small furious notations because she kept working anyway.

changes.before: Muradin Bronzebeard might have been cut from the camp itself.
changes.after: Muradin Bronzebeard was cut from the camp itself.

changes.before: In Northrend, the cold was absolute.
changes.after: Cold bit through wool, fur, and pride alike.

changes.before: So had the delay between thought and deed.
changes.after: Weight sat forward on his feet, ready to break into motion.

changes.before: So had the delay between thought and deed.
changes.after: Weight sat forward on his feet, ready to break into motion.

changes.before: The threshold had been built for the dead.
changes.after: At the threshold the cold turned hard against her skin. A ward lay across the mouth and pushed living flesh back.
